Chelsea, after all, are in the market for a centre-back this summer — but there was never any danger of them executing their option. Like City and United, the Londoners have a certain profile for the defender they want this summer and while they did explore the possibility of buying Ake back earlier in the year, their scouting analysis showed he was not as tall and aerially strong as they need, particularly given their problems at set pieces.

Like City’s reports, Chelsea did identify him as a very good left-sided centre-back; good on the ball, brave in possession and also versatile. But in terms of being the player that Chelsea need to come in and make a mark on the team from a leadership point of view, they felt better off looking elsewhere.

In fact, City feel the same. Of course, they value Ake as a fine player, capable of providing cover for Laporte and indeed playing many games in his own right, but they want Kalidou Koulibaly from Napoli to bring that injection of leadership and send a message to the rest of the squad and to the rest of the Premier League.

總結: 唔夠高 唔夠硬淨 制空力唔夠高 同埋車想搵個leader

Like City and United, the Londoners have a certain profile for the defender they want this summer and while they did explore the possibility of buying Ake back earlier in the year, their scouting analysis showed he was not as tall and aerially strong as they need, particularly given their problems at set pieces.

Like City’s reports, Chelsea did identify him as a very good left-sided centre-back; good on the ball, brave in possession and also versatile. But in terms of being the player that Chelsea need to come in and make a mark on the team from a leadership point of view, they felt better off looking elsewhere.

In fact, City feel the same. Of course, they value Ake as a fine player, capable of providing cover for Laporte and indeed playing many games in his own right, but they want Kalidou Koulibaly from Napoli to bring that injection of leadership and send a message to the rest of the squad and to the rest of the Premier League.

Chelsea, after all, are in the market for a centre-back this summer — but there was never any danger of them executing their option. Like City and United, the Londoners have a certain profile for the defender they want this summer and while they did explore the possibility of buying Ake back earlier in the year, their scouting analysis showed he was not as tall and aerially strong as they need, particularly given their problems at set pieces.

Like City’s reports, Chelsea did identify him as a very good left-sided centre-back; good on the ball, brave in possession and also versatile. But in terms of being the player that Chelsea need to come in and make a mark on the team from a leadership point of view, they felt better off looking elsewhere.

In fact, City feel the same. Of course, they value Ake as a fine player, capable of providing cover for Laporte and indeed playing many games in his own right, but they want Kalidou Koulibaly from Napoli to bring that injection of leadership and send a message to the rest of the squad and to the rest of the Premier League.
